description: Style Note The hot bottom wear trend of wearing corduroys is not restricted to men. Women are rocking this trend by pairing it with formal shirts and blouses for a semi formal look or stylish tops for a more casual look. Pumps on the feet look best. Kraus gets it just right with these corduroy trousers. Product Details Brown corduroy trousers, has a button and zipped closure, two insert pockets in front, belt loops around the waist, brand patch at the back on the waistband, two patch pockets at the back with stitched detail and slight stretch. Material and Care Blended Machine wash cold Tumble dry low Do not bleach Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size 28
